title: How is this possible P3II
wikitext:
[]: How is this possible? [P3II]             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Mon Mar 07, 2011 4:52 pm In EoE, how was Shinji able to communicate with Asuka, Misato, etc. right after the Sandbox Sequence? Instrumentality hadn't started yet, had it? So how could they all talk to each other (even though Asuka and Misato were already dead)?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 07, 2011 5:12 pm It's commonly referred to as Pre-3I Instrumentality . One thing to note is that Rei has visited Ritsuko and Misato after their untimely deaths but they have not been tanged. So maybe Rei is connecting them to Shinji somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Mar 10, 2011 4:16 pm Is there another thread on this? I couldn't really find much using search.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 10, 2011 7:21 pm I don't think there's been a thread about this specific topic, but it's been talked about in various other threads. I don't think there's really any good explanation to go off of, much like most of what happens in EoE. This thread mentions it: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=137295#137295 Also many more: http://www.google.com/search?hl=en&safe=off&biw=1065&bih=1094&q=Asuka+Shinji+Misato+eoe+site%3Aforum.evageeks.org&aq=f&aqi=&aql=&oq= (for example)

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Mar 10, 2011 8:55 pm Ornette wrote: I don't think there's really any good explanation to go off of, much like most of what happens in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:31 pm No soul = no ATF to hold the shape of ones body. Thus if the souls were actually taken out of people like Misato and Ritsuko, who both died before 3rd impact and was visited by Rei, they would have been turned into LCL, however, neither of them were. Ritsuko was still floating around and Misato, although blown into 2, you can later see her torso half turned into LCL. Although Ritsuko doesn't seem to be a part of P3II, both her and Misato's circumstances are similar, died before 3rd Impact, visisted by a Rei, but not tanged until later when 3rd Impact starts. This implies that their souls weren't removed. They're still being connected somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:33 pm Ornette wrote: Although Ritsuko doesn't seem to be a part of P3II

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:42 pm Ornette wrote: This implies that their souls weren't removed.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Mar 11, 2011 10:15 am Note that Shinji only sees the "dead" ppl(Asuka, Misato...) at this point, and that the MP-EVAS already started performing their little ritual around him. If I'm not mistaken, the lance starts merging with EVA 01 after Kaworu calms Shinji down a bit, so he's already transformed into the "origin of every existence"... The souls of the already-collected probably entered the ToL as soon as it was finished... EDIT:@ Azathoth: Yes, Ritsuko is included. She says something like "I'm needed, at least physically"
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » M

Ritsuko was still floating around and Misato, although blown into 2, you can later see her torso half turned into LCL.
